ui.drop_mod_hint: Drop mod zip or folder here

preview.contains_dlls: ⚠ Contains DLL files - Only install from trusted sources!

settings.title: Settings
settings.dll_injection_hint: Creates manifest for Mewjector chainloader (required for .dll mods)
settings.dll_injection_warning: ⚠ Security: Only install DLL mods from trusted sources

onboarding.intro_description: Mewism is a mod manager for Mewgenics. Install mods, manage load order, and launch the game with one click.
onboarding.setup_description: Choose your language, appearance, and where Mewgenics is installed.
onboarding.complete_description: Mewism is ready. You can change these settings anytime from the Settings page.

messages.setup_required_text:
Game paths are not configured yet.
Please enter your settings.
messages.game_dir_not_detected: Unable to detect the Mewgenics installation.
messages.exe_not_found: Mewgenics.exe not found in the selected game directory.
messages.permission_denied_modlist:
Permission denied: Unable to write to modlist.txt.
Make sure the folder has write permissions.
messages.proton_warning_text:
You are running on Linux with a Windows .exe (Proton).

Mods outside the game directory may not work correctly.
It's recommended to keep mods in the game folder on Linux/Steam Deck.

Continue anyway?
messages.no_mods_text: No mods are enabled. Enable some mods first.
messages.launch_options_instructions:
Copy these launch options and paste them in Steam:
Right-click game → Properties → Launch Options

Note: On Linux/Proton/Steam Deck, keep mods in the game directory for best compatibility.
messages.export_bat_instructions:
The launch script has been saved. To use it with Steam:

1. Right-click Mewgenics in your Steam library
2. Select Properties → Launch Options
3. Paste the following line:
messages.export_bat_note:
Note: The batch file contains all your current mod settings. Re-export if you change mods or settings.

If DLL injection is enabled, Mewism.exe and configuration files are included for standalone operation.
messages.no_mods_to_sort: No mods are enabled to sort.
messages.dll_injection_prompt:
⚠ SECURITY WARNING: DLL files can execute arbitrary code with full system privileges. Only enable DLL mods from trusted sources!

This mod contains DLL files. Would you like to enable DLL mod support?

Mewism will create a manifest file that Mewjector (external DLL chainloader) can read. You can change this setting later in Settings > Launch Options.
messages.dll_injection_chainloader_warning: ⚠ WARNING: chainloader.ini was not found in your game directory. You need to install Mewjector (DLL chainloader) for DLL mods to work.
messages.dll_cleanup_nothing: No DLL manifest found in chainloader configuration.
messages.dll_cleanup_confirm:
This will clear the DLL manifest from chainloader configuration.

Continue?
messages.dll_cleanup_success: DLL manifest has been cleared from chainloader configuration.
